login.title: Welcome to myAdmin
login.subtitle: Sign in to access your dashboard
login.secureLoginInfo: Sign in with your email and password, or use a passkey for faster, more secure access.
login.loginFailedDescription: Incorrect email or password. Please try again.
login.passkeyFailed: Passkey authentication failed. Please try again.
login.noPasskeyRegistered: No passkey registered for this account.
login.passkeyNotSupported: Passkeys are not supported in this browser.

unauthorized.title: Access Denied
unauthorized.subtitle: You don't have permission to access this resource
unauthorized.requiredRoles: Required roles (you need at least one):
unauthorized.contactAdmin: Contact your administrator to request the necessary permissions.

callback.pleaseWait: Please wait while we complete your sign-in

session.expiredMessage: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
session.sessionError: There is a problem with your session

passkey.title: Passkeys
passkey.registerSuccessDesc: You can now sign in with this passkey.
passkey.registerFailed: Failed to register passkey. Please try again.
passkey.noPasskeys: No passkeys registered yet. Register one for faster, more secure sign-in.
passkey.confirmDeleteBody: This passkey will no longer work for sign-in. You can register a new one later.
passkey.prompt: Register a passkey for faster, more secure login.

forgotPassword.title: Reset Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a verification code.
forgotPassword.codeSent: Verification code sent to your email.
forgotPassword.resetSubtitle: Enter the code from your email and your new password.
forgotPassword.resetSuccess: Password reset successfully. You can now sign in.
